html:
Exclusive to:  

A Cactus is a form of flora in Don't Starve Together, found only in the Desert biome. Cactus Flesh can be harvested from the Cactus at the cost of 6 Health. Wearing armor will decrease the amount of damage taken. When harvested it will drop Cactus Flesh during any season, but only in Summer will it drop its Flower.

Cacti cannot be dug up with a Shovel. The player will have to wait for them to regrow in 4 (3 during Spring) days to be able to harvest them again. Unlike most other plants, Cacti can grow back during winter, unaffected by the cold. Therefore, Cactus Flesh can be easily farmed and used in lieu of farmed vegetables during Winter.

Apart from their appearance, they do not differ from the original version. Both types co-exist in regular worlds: The Oasis Cactus only appears in the Desert containing the Oasis and the Antlion, while the original one can be found in the Desert containing the Dragonfly Set Piece and Hound Mounds.

If a Cactus is burnt, they are renewable. Their base regrowth is 20 days, which is the case during Autumn and Spring. It's completely paused during Winter, twice as fast in Summer, and slowed by 20% during Rain.

Tips

  • Wearing a Bramble Husk will allow the player to pick the cacti with no health loss, and also no damage to the armor itself. This makes Wormwood an effective Cactus farmer.
  • The Health lost is mostly negated by using a Football Helmet or Log Suit. With either of these equipped when picking the cactus, one takes only 1.2 damage and eating the cooked flesh will reduce this to 0.2.

Trivia

  • Although there appears to be a dug up version shown in image files, there is currently no known way to dig one up.
  • The Cactus is modeled after the typical Barrel Cactus.
  • The Oasis Cactus variant was introduced in the Against the Grain update.
  • The Curse of Moon Quay update made Cacti renewable due to regrowth.

Gallery

  • Cactus in the game files.
  • WX-78 standing next to some Oasis Cacti.
  • Oasis Cactus with flowers.
  • Cactus with flowers.
  • Oasis Cactus Picked
  • Cactus Picked
  • Unused Dropped Oasis Cactus as an Item
  • Unused Dropped Oasis Cactus as an Item

“Sharp but delicious.”
–Wilson
“Spines! My weakness! How did you know?”
–Willow
“Wolfgang not like sharp plant.”
–Wolfgang
“Knives out.”
–Wendy
“PROTECTIVE BARRIER PRESENT. PROCEED WITH CAUTION.”
–WX-78
“A young barrel cactus.”
–Wickerbottom
“That's gonna hurt.”
–Woodie
“Puffer plant.”
–Maxwell
“Intrinsically reactionary!”
–Wagstaff
“It döes have admirable armör.”
–Wigfrid
“It's got more things coming out of it than we do.”
–Webber
“It's fine if you just leave it alone.”
–Walani
“I bet it has a sharp flavor.”
–Warly
“Ye have a sharp taste ye do.”
–Woodlegs
“IT BE POINTY FOODS”
–Wilba
“Ouch Friend”
–Wormwood
“It's almost like it doesn't want to be eaten.”
–Wheeler
“Prickly.”
–Winona
“Spiny and mean, just how I like them.”
–Wortox
“It full of spikes.”
–Wurt
“That's one prickly plant.”
–Walter
“I wonder if it's really worth the bother.”
–Wanda
A Cactus is a form of flora in Don't Starve Together, found only in the Desert biome. Cactus Flesh can be harvested from the Cactus at the cost of 6 Health. Wearing armor will decrease the amount of damage taken. When harvested it will drop Cactus Flesh during any season, but only in Summer will it drop its Flower.
Cacti cannot be dug up with a Shovel. The player will have to wait for them to regrow in 4 (3 during Spring) days to be able to harvest them again. Unlike most other plants, Cacti can grow back during winter, unaffected by the cold. Therefore, Cactus Flesh can be easily farmed and used in lieu of farmed vegetables during Winter.
Apart from their appearance, they do not differ from the original version. Both types co-exist in regular worlds: The Oasis Cactus only appears in the Desert containing the Oasis and the Antlion, while the original one can be found in the Desert containing the Dragonfly Set Piece and Hound Mounds.
If a Cactus is burnt, they are renewable. Their base regrowth is 20 days, which is the case during Autumn and Spring. It's completely paused during Winter, twice as fast in Summer, and slowed by 20% during Rain.

Wearing a Bramble Husk will allow the player to pick the cacti with no health loss, and also no damage to the armor itself. This makes Wormwood an effective Cactus farmer.
The Health lost is mostly negated by using a Football Helmet or Log Suit. With either of these equipped when picking the cactus, one takes only 1.2 damage and eating the cooked flesh will reduce this to 0.2.

Although there appears to be a dug up version shown in image files, there is currently no known way to dig one up.

Wearing armor will decrease the amount of damage taken. When harvested it will drop [[Cactus Flesh]] during any season, but only in [[Summer]] will it drop its [[Cactus Flower|Flower]]. Cacti cannot be dug up with a [[Shovel]]. The player will have to wait for them to regrow in 4 (3 during [[Spring]]) days to be able to harvest them again. Unlike most other plants, Cacti can grow back during winter, unaffected by the cold. Therefore, Cactus Flesh can be easily farmed and used in lieu of farmed vegetables during Winter. Apart from their appearance, they do not differ from the original version. Both types co-exist in regular worlds: The Oasis Cactus only appears in the Desert containing the [[Set Piece#Oasis|Oasis]] and the [[Antlion]], while the original one can be found in the Desert containing the [[Dragonfly]] [[Set Piece]] and [[Hound Mound]]s. If a Cactus is burnt, they are renewable. Their base [[regrowth]] is 20 days, which is the case during Autumn and Spring. It's completely paused during Winter, twice as fast in Summer, and slowed by 20% during Rain. =={{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == *Wearing a [[Bramble Husk]] will allow the player to pick the cacti with no health loss, and also no damage to the armor itself. This makes [[Wormwood]] an effective Cactus farmer. * The Health lost is mostly negated by using a [[Football Helmet]] or [[Log Suit]]. With either of these equipped when picking the cactus, one takes only 1.2 damage and eating the cooked flesh will reduce this to 0.2. =={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia== *Although there appears to be a dug up version shown in image files, there is currently no known way to dig one up. *The Cactus is modeled after the typical [[Wikipedia:Barrel Cactus|Barrel Cactus]]. *The Oasis Cactus variant was introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#February 2nd, 2017 - Against the Grain|Against the Grain]]'' update. *''The Curse of Moon Quay'' update made Cacti renewable due to regrowth. =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Cactus f.jpg|Cactus in the game files.
